_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the application firewall concepts and functions (e.g., Single point of authentication/audit/policy enforcement, message scanning for malicious content, data anonymization for PCI and PII compliance, data loss protection scanning, accelerated cryptographic operations, SSL security, REST/JSON processing).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encryption at rest and in transit, identity and access management, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-013 (TF, cosine: 0.598), SP-K-010 (SP, cosine: 0.522).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.578). Shared vocabulary: [audit, data, knowledge, rest, security]. DCWF-only terms [accelerated, anonymization, application, authentication, compliance, concepts] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, controls, encryption, identity, isolation, logging] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.850, R=0.895). R exceeds P by 0.045 — the WIDAI KSA's 22 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 37 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (95.1%). The model interprets "Knowledge of the application firewall concepts and functions (e.g., Single point" as logically implying aspects of "Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encry" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Equal' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.658 > STS 0.578 (gap +0.080). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [audit, data, knowledge, rest, security] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [audit, data, knowledge, rest, security]. DCWF-only: [accelerated, anonymization, application, authentication, compliance, concepts]. WIDAI-only: [access, controls, encryption, identity, isolation, logging].
